metadata.description: Framework-agnostic harness for autonomous agent-driven development with Claude Code. Provides workflow automation, enforcement, context engineering, and cross-session memory.

plugins.name: agent-harness
plugins.description: Complete harness for autonomous agent-driven development. Bootstrap new or existing projects, implement features with TDD and quality gates, create PRs with automated review cycles, capture learnings to cross-session memory, and maintain codebase health. Use for any project setup, feature implementation, code review, or codebase maintenance workflow.
